name: EgoVLA
license: code MIT; reused labels follow each source dataset license
redistribution: n/a (reuses each source dataset's labels under their licenses)
suitability: descriptive-only: VLA reusing existing labels, no standalone corpus
focus_en: Pretrains a VLA on egocentric human videos to predict wrist/hand actions, then retargets via inverse kinematics for a bimanual humanoid, with a new manipulation benchmark.
focus_cn: 在第一人称人类视频上预训练 VLA 以预测腕部/手部动作，再经逆运动学重定向到双臂仿人机器人，并提出新的操作基准。
datapath_en: EgoVLA is pretrained on egocentric human manipulation videos drawn from HOI4D, HOT3D, HoloAssist and TACO, paired with their language task instructions, learning to predict future wrist poses and MANO hand parameters from images, instructions and proprioception. A unified human and robot action space lets it retarget predicted human actions to a bimanual humanoid via inverse kinematics, then fine-tune on a few robot demonstrations. It reuses the source datasets' labels rather than publishing a new standalone corpus.
datapath_cn: EgoVLA 在来自 HOI4D、HOT3D、HoloAssist 与 TACO 的第一人称人类操作视频上预训练，配合其语言任务指令，学习从图像、指令与本体感受预测未来腕部姿态与 MANO 手部参数。统一的人类与机器人动作空间使其能通过逆运动学将预测的人类动作重定向到双臂仿人机器人，再用少量机器人演示微调。它复用各来源数据集的标注，而非发布新的独立语料。
flow_en: egocentric human video (HOI4D, HOT3D, HoloAssist, TACO) + instructions
VLA predicts wrist + MANO hand actions
flow_cn: 第一人称人类视频（HOI4D、HOT3D、HoloAssist、TACO） + 指令
VLA 预测腕部 + MANO 手部动作
逆运动学重定向到仿人机器人
no_corpus_en: EgoVLA is a VLA method that reuses task instructions already published by HOI4D, HOT3D, HoloAssist and TACO (each under its own license) and releases code (MIT) and checkpoints. It does not assemble or redistribute a new standalone language corpus, so there is nothing independently clusterable here.
no_corpus_cn: EgoVLA 是一种 VLA 方法，复用 HOI4D、HOT3D、HoloAssist 与 TACO 已发布的任务指令（各自遵循其许可），并发布代码（MIT）与检查点。它不汇编或再分发新的独立语言语料，因此没有可独立聚类的内容。
example_caption_en: EgoVLA predicts human wrist and hand motion from egocentric video and language; the project page shows ground-truth versus predicted motion and instruction-following examples.
example_caption_cn: EgoVLA 从第一人称视频与语言中预测人类腕部与手部运动；项目主页展示了真值与预测运动以及指令跟随示例。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2507.12440, rchalyang.github.io/EgoVLA, and github.com/RchalYang/EgoVLA_Release (MIT).
citation: Yang et al., EgoVLA: Learning Vision-Language-Action Models from Egocentric Human Videos, arXiv 2025 (arXiv:2507.12440).
